name: Aluminum Radiator Calculator
seo_title: How Many Radiator Elements Do I Need?
seo_description: Aluminium Radiator Calculator. Room area, Ceiling height, Orientation — get Volume, Watts needed, Radiator elements instantly for your plumbing and water.
example_label: Calculatete aluminum radiators needed for a 20m2 room with 2.5m height.
result_context: Habitación of {area_m2}m² with orientación {orientacion} requires radiator of {power_w} W ({elementos_ud} elementos of aluminio). volume: {volumen_m3} m³.
formula_display: Volume = area × height; power = volume × factor_orientación (35-50 W/m³)
steps: Factor orientación norte: 50 W/m³ (more power per lesser sol)
mistakes: Not Consider orientación (norte requires 15-20% more power)
Not prever válvulas termostáticas to control individual
Ubicar radiator in lugar incorrecto (debe ir low ventana)
description: Radiator sizing based on room volume and heat loss.
